sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 254782, official name "Cottaneva Creek", Stream, CA, Mendocino Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":254782,"gaz_name":"Cottaneva Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA"} — first-point coordinate -123.8292, 39.7360; correcting the file's prior coordinate (-123.7950, 39.7460), ~3.1km away.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(33) — Cottoneva Creek (Mendocino Co.)
sources.quotedText: (33) Cottoneva Creek (Mendocino Co.). Main stem below the confluence of South Fork Cottoneva Creek. Fourth Sat. in May through Mar. 31. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31. Only barbless hooks may be used from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Closed from April 1 through the day before the fourth Saturday in May.

regulations.humanSummary: Open from the fourth Saturday in May through March 31 on the main stem below the confluence of South Fork Cottoneva Creek
regulations.verbatimText: Fourth Sat. in May through Mar. 31.

parameters.note: Applies from the fourth Saturday in May through October 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Saturday in May through October 31
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used from November 1 through March 31
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: Limit applies to hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead combined (denoted ** in the CDFW table, indicating hatchery-origin fish).

regulations.humanSummary: Daily bag limit 2, possession limit 4, hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead combined
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Also subject to Low-Flow Fishing Closure provisions of 14 CCR §8.00(b); fishing may be closed when stream flow drops below the threshold specified for this water.

regulations.humanSummary: Subject to Section 8.00(b) low-flow fishing closure restrictions

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
